positive: An ethereal forest gathering featuring a stylized group of whimsical, bioluminescent forest creatures (e.g., fox-like sprites, glowing mushrooms, crystalline insects) gathered around a central, highly detailed tree trunk. The style is elegant, neo-art nouveau, combining deep midnight blues, vibrant glowing cyan, emerald green, and warm gold accents. Composition should be circular and symmetrical, suitable for a t-shirt print, with strong silhouettes against a misty, dark background. High contrast, clean vector aesthetic, centered design. Concept art, flat graphic style mixed with digital painting quality. Golden ratio composition. Volumetric lighting from the glowing elements, rim lighting defining the creatures' edges. Ultra-detailed, matte finish, clean lines.
negative: blurry, grainy, ugly, deformed, extra limbs, bad anatomy, text, logo, watermark, signature, realistic photo, low contrast, noise, artifacts, jpeg artifacts
